U

updateAppointmentStatus(String, String, AppointmentRepository.OnStatusUpdateCallback) - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.AppointmentRepository
Updates the status of an existing appointment.
updateCounselorProfile(String, Counselor, CounselorRepository.OnUpdateCallback) - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.CounselorRepository
Overwrites all profile fields for a counselor.
updateSpecializations(String, List<String>, CounselorRepository.OnUpdateCallback) - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.CounselorRepository
Updates the specialization tags for a counselor.
UserRepository - Class in com.example.moogerscouncil
Repository for the Firestore 'users' collection.
UserRepository() - Constructor for class com.example.moogerscouncil.UserRepository
Constructs a UserRepository backed by the live Firestore instance.
UserRepository.OnRoleFetchedCallback - Interface in com.example.moogerscouncil
Callback for role-only fetch operations used for post-login routing.
UserRepository.OnUserCreatedCallback - Interface in com.example.moogerscouncil
Callback for user creation operations.
UserRepository.OnUserFetchedCallback - Interface in com.example.moogerscouncil
Callback for user fetch operations that return a full Student object.
UserRepository.OnUserNameCallback - Interface in com.example.moogerscouncil
Callback for name-only user lookups.
UserRole - Class in com.example.moogerscouncil
String constants for user roles stored in Firestore.
